details: In 2 October 2021, The "Mukhyamantri Vriddhjan Samman Pension Yojana" was started by the Labore department of Rajasthan. It will provide the benefits to old age people. By offering financial assistance, the program not only eases the burden of financial worries but also honors the lifelong contributions of seniors to the state's social fabric. It recognizes their wisdom, experience, and resilience, affirming their rightful place in society and ensuring they can live out their golden years with dignity and respect.
eligibility: The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan and living in Rajasthan,
The female applicant should be 55 years or older.
The male applicant should be aged 58 years or older
The total annual income of the wife/husband from all sources should be less than ₹48,000/-
People belonging to BPL/Antyodaya/Aastha Card holding families/Sahariya/Kathauri, Khairwa castes have been exempted from the income-related condition.

online: Then you will be redirected to the SSO registration page. The registration page will appear with the following options.
Choose the either one option from the Jan Aadhaar Or Google to process further.
Jan Aadhaar : Enter the Jan Aadhaar number, click on the ‘Next’ button,
Select your name, the name of the head of the family and all the other members and
Click on the ‘Send OTP’ button. Enter the ‘OTP’ and
Click on the ‘Verify OTP’ button to Complete the registration.
Google : Enter the Gmail ID, click on the ‘Next’ button,
A new link appear on screen, now click on new SSO link.
SSO id will appear on screen, now create the password.
Enter Mobile number, click on registration.
Enter the "Bhamashah Family ID" and search.
Select the person name and scheme name.
Complete the Aadhaar Authentication and click on get details.
Fees for Chief Minister Old Age Samman Pension Scheme is Rs. 33/-. Payment of fees can be done through E-Mitra.

documents_required: Bank passbook front page copy (Account holder name, Account No, IFSC code).

faqs.question: What is the objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The Rajasthan government's Social Justice and Empowerment Department launched the "Mukhyamantri Vriddhjan Samman Pension Yojana" program, a social welfare initiative that aims to improve the lives of senior citizens residing in the state by providing them with monthly financial assistance.

faqs.question: How much financial benefits are provided under the scheme?
Who can get the benefits of the scheme ?
faqs.answer: Native of the Rajasthan state who full fill the eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: What is the minimum eligible age to the scheme benefits ?
faqs.answer: Women aged 55 years or more and men aged 58 years or more.

faqs.question: Can Other state person also apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: A native of the Rajasthan state only.

faqs.question: What is the financial eligibility for applicant ?
faqs.answer: Annual income from all sources should be less than ₹48,000/-.

faqs.question: Is there an application fee?
faqs.answer: Fees for Chief Minister Old Age Samman Pension Scheme is Rs. 33/- . Payment of fees can be done through E-Mitra. What DBT DBT stands for Direct Benefit Transfer. It is a mechanism used by governments to transfer financial assistance or subsidies directly to the bank accounts of beneficiaries.

faqs.question: What is IFSC code?
faqs.answer: The IFSC code uniquely identifies a specific bank branch participating in electronic fund transfer systems in India.

faqs.question: What is Bhamashah Card ?
faqs.answer: The Bhamashah card provided by this yojana is linked to a bank account in the name of the housewife. The card also provides women with biometric identification and core banking functions, as well as a variety of cash benefits that are directly transferred to their bank account.
